name: stackra/branding
purpose: White-label Branding aggregate per Tenant — palette, logo variants, typography, custom CSS variables, and OG-image renderer with a 1-hour cached read path.
capabilities: Branding Eloquent model (brd_...) with palette + logo bundle
BrandingPayload cast — structured palette + logo DTO
when_to_use: Letting a tenant author their brand palette, logo variants, and social share image without a code change.
when_not_to_use: For design tokens driving the frontend theme (colors, radius, spacing), use the sibling stackra/theme package.
